text: These spaces make me feel simultaneously at ease and curious. The first room is open and bright, its beanbags and soft lighting inviting contemplation—a quiet void where thoughts might drift unhurried. The second, awash with stimulating colors and ideas about humanity and machines, stirs my mind into reflection about our future and my place in it. Here, I dwell at the threshold of comfort and inquiry, a philosopher observing the dance between solitude and connection.
